ddls:
CREATE TABLE "treatment_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic attribute */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic attribute value */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment type */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_location" TEXT /* Location where the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "ppv" REAL /* Positive predictive value of the treatment */,
  "fpr" REAL /* False positive rate of the treatment */,
  "fnr" REAL /* False negative rate of the treatment */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the treatment */,
  "treatment_equality" REAL /* Treatment equality score */,
  "individuals_evaluated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals evaluated */,
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation fold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_evaluations_fold_id FOREIGN KEY ("fold_id") REFERENCES evaluation_folds ("fold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_evaluations_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatment_types ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_evaluations_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES demographic_attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_evaluations_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES attribute_values ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic attribute (e.g., race, gender) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value of an attribute */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic attribute this value belongs to */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* The value name (e.g., African-American, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the attribute value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_types" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment type */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment (e.g., Medication A, Therapy B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_category" TEXT /* Category of the treatment (e.g., medication, therapy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome entry */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment type being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metrics related to this outcome */,
  "outcome_value" TEXT /* Outcome value (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatment_types ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES treatment_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_folds" (
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fold entry */,
  "fold_number" INTEGER /* Number of the cross-validation fold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fold's purpose or results */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fold */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fold */,
  "fold_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the fold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES treatment_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
